[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeCamera](../../TextmodeCamera.md) / copy

# Method: copy()

```ts
copy(): TextmodeCamera;
```

Create a copy of this camera.

## Returns

[`TextmodeCamera`](../../TextmodeCamera.md)
